name: Numerical Propagator Plugin (Tudat)
description: High-fidelity numerical orbit propagator powered by Tudat-WASM. Supports configurable force models (point-mass, J2/J4/full spherical harmonics, atmospheric drag, SRP, third-body, relativistic corrections), multiple integrators (RK4, RKF45/78, Bulirsch-Stoer, ABM), and covariance/STM propagation.

inputs.name: initial_state
inputs.description: Initial Cartesian state (position + velocity in J2000 ECI, meters + m/s)

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Propagation configuration (force model, integrator, time range)
